name: Merchandise Promotion
description: Promotional post for Dinamo branded merchandise including apparel, accessories, and collectibles from the official club shop.
guidelines: High-quality product photography on a clean background. Carousel format with each slide featuring a different product or angle. Include pricing and any discount information prominently. If running a promotion, the discount badge should be eye-catching but not overwhelming. Link to the official shop. Lifestyle shots of fans wearing the merchandise are encouraged.
